payload.answer: I won’t save this as a memory because today’s weather is temporary and not useful as durable personal context.

entity_resolution.reason: The statement is transient, time-sensitive weather information and does not provide durable personal memory value.

details: Rejected transient weather observation: “Today’s weather is cloudy.”

repair_options: If this relates to a lasting preference, save that instead, e.g. “I prefer cloudy weather.”
If this affects a plan, save the durable plan context, e.g. “I reschedule outdoor activities when it is cloudy.”
